since_last: 39% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.84%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 39% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.01% · BTC -1.01% · Gold +0.69% · Nasdaq100 +0.75%. 39% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.84%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.84%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -3.19%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -6.28%
cards.body: Leaders: MGNI +5.25%, SYNA +4.62%, EQIX +2.85%, PUBM +2.43%, WDAY +1.52%. Laggards: MU -6.28%, MRVL -5.22%, ARM -4.81%, VRT -4.61%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.12% at $149.76
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.12% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
